## How this helps a small team

## Legal and compliance safety

- [ ] No claim that this guarantees compliance
- [ ] Uses cautious wording where needed
- [ ] Disclaimer respected
- [ ] Source notes updated if legal wording changed
- [ ] No confidential or personal data included

## Quality

- [ ] Ran `./maint/scripts/check-toolkit-quality.sh`
- [ ] Links checked where practical
- [ ] Markdown renders cleanly
